KERRY LAIW, ESQ. OF BRAYTON PURCELL LLP, (415) 898-1555, FOR PLAINTIFFS/OPPOSING PARTIES, REBECCA GORMAN, ET AL.

RULING:
DEFENDANT WARREN PUMPS, INC.'D MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. CCP SECTION 170.6 CHALLENGE IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. "WHERE THE JUDGE ASSIGNED TO HEAR THE MATTER IS KNOWN AT LEAST TEN(10) DAYS BEFORE THE DATE SET FOR THE HEARING, THE MOTION SHALL BE MADE AT LEAST FIVE(5) DAYS BEFORE THAT DATE." THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 27, 2005 PER STIPULATION AND ORDER FILED ON JULY 8, 2005. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED HER OPPOSITION TO THE COURT. REPLY IS DUE ON JULY 22, 2005. (301/JLW) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558
